title: caleana lyonsii
intro: Caleana lyonsii, also known as the Greenhood orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Caleana lyonsii include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its antimicrobial properties. Caleana lyonsii can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, which is often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
